query: Implementation is done and we have test results, scans, and metrics — audit the NFR evidence for performance, security, reliability, and scalability and grade each one PASS/CONCERNS/FAIL before release.
Evaluate our non-functional requirements against the evidence we've collected and tell me which attributes are release blockers.
We have load-test output and a security scan for the checkout service — audit the NFRs and give me an evidence-based gate on whether the non-functional bar is met.
No code is written yet — help me define the NFR thresholds and risk-based test strategy for this epic before implementation.
Map our acceptance criteria to the existing tests and give me a coverage traceability matrix and quality-gate decision.
Review the quality of these Playwright test files — flag flakiness, hard waits, and missing assertions.
